title: Valve Steam Machine price hike similar to Steam Deck's 45% increase, company confirms was probably priced competitively against the PS5 Pro before the RAMpocalypse
summary: Valve confirms Steam Machine price hike, estimated at under $750 base price. The price increase is similar to Steam Deck's 45% hike. This adjustment was made before the RAMpocalypse.
insight: Pre-RAMpocalypse pricing reflects competition with PS5 Pro, not inflation costs.

title: China black market Nvidia prices rocket in wake of smuggling crackdown and customs freeze five-year-old A100 servers triple in price, now fetching up to $82,000
summary: Chinese companies are paying exorbitant prices for 5-year-old Nvidia A100 servers, up to $82,000, due to a customs freeze and smuggling crackdown.
insight: Supply chain disruptions fuel artificial demand for outdated tech components

title: Meta pauses mandatory AI training program that tracked employee keystrokes after internal data leak exposed sensitive staff information company-wide employees express frustration over poor handling of data
summary: Meta has paused an AI training program after sensitive employee data was leaked.
insight: Employees' personal data vulnerabilities expose trust in company's handling practices.

title: This brilliant $11 power button gadget lets you switch your PC on from your desk with ease perfect desk upgrade means you don't need to bend down to turn your rig on or off anymore, ships with super-durable mechanical keys and RGB lighting
summary: A statement power button upgrade for your desk is available at an affordable $11 price point, featuring super-durable mechanical keys and RGB lighting.
insight: Convenient PC access without bending down matters greatly for users.

title: Nvidia announces liquid cooling system that runs hotter than a hot tub promises to reduce electricity consumption and cut water use by up to 100%, but sustainability challenges remain
summary: Nvidia's new liquid cooling system runs at 113°F to reduce costs and water consumption.
insight: Raising coolant temperature saves energy while minimizing water usage.

title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ review: Unmatched performance and a jaw-dropping price tag
summary: The MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ offers unmatched performance but a high price tag, making it a questionable value at $1,799.
insight: Unmatched performance comes at a steep and questionable price premium.

title: China's LineShine supercomputer dethrones US' El Capitan, secures first place in Top 500 list first machine in the rankings to sustain more than 2 ExaFLOPS of double-precision performance using only CPUs
summary: China's LineShine supercomputer has dethroned the US' El Capitan, securing first place in the Top 500 list, as the first machine to sustain over 2 ExaFLOPS of double-precision performance using only CPUs. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the global supercomputing landscape.
insight: China's LineShine supercomputer leads in double-precision performance globally

title: California drivers accuse gas station operators of using AI to boost pump prices lawsuit seeks damages for antitrust violations
summary: California drivers accuse gas stations of using AI to inflate prices, exacerbating the state's already high gas prices. A proposed class action lawsuit seeks damages for alleged antitrust violations. The lawsuit claims that the AI-tool prioritizes profits over consumers.
insight: Artificial intelligence fuels price gouging in California's already overpriced gas market

title: Oracle lays off 21,000 employees in just 12 months due to AI adoption and costly AI infrastructure ambitions says layoffs will continue as internal AI deployment grows
summary: Oracle laid off 21,000 employees in 12 months due to AI adoption and costly cloud expansions.
insight: AI-driven restructuring imperils Oracle's workforce and financial stability.

title: Graperain GR1126MB development board features solder-on 3 TOPS Rockchip RV1126B AI Vision module
summary: The Graperain GR1126MB development board features a Rockchip RV1126B AI Vision module with 3 TOPS NPU, suitable for AI vision, machine vision, and edge AI applications.
insight: Edge AI solutions get a significant compute boost with 3 TOPS NPU.

title: RP2350B bells&whistles development board features on-board RP2040 debugger, HDMI, and microSD card slot
summary: The Bells&Whistles development board features an RP2350B SoC with onboard RP2040 debugger, HDMI, and microSD card slot, ideal for clutter-free prototyping and development.
insight: Streamlined development workflow with integrated debugger and peripherals.

title: Visualize radio signals with Raspberry Pi 5-based QuadRF 4 4 MIMO software-defined radio tile (Crowdfunding)
summary: QuadRF is a Raspberry Pi 5-based software-defined radio tile that visualizes radio signals in real-time using a phone or computer. It measures differences in signal arrival time and renders a live RF overlay at 30 FPS. This enables users to see RF signals from various devices.
insight: Real-time RF visualization offers new insights into wireless device interactions.

title: Aliro is a vendor-agnostic standard for digital access control working over NFC, Bluetooth LE, or UWB
summary: Aliro is a vendor-agnostic standard for digital access control, leveraging NFC, Bluetooth LE, or UWB, and utilizing asymmetric cryptography for secure interactions between devices. It integrates with digital wallets from major tech companies. This standard aims to address market fragmentation in access control.
insight: Aliro streamlines secure digital access control across multiple device platforms.

title: Sensors magic from the labs at UD and MSU
summary: Researchers at UD and MSU are developing innovative sensors for wearable healthcare materials. These sensors aim to improve patient monitoring and diagnosis. Their work has the potential to revolutionize healthcare technology.
insight: Transforming healthcare with wearable, real-time monitoring and diagnosis capabilities.

title: Virtuix launches Omni One for Quest with Meta, bringing full-body movement to traditional VR controls
summary: Virtuix's Omni One system combines VR with full-body movement capabilities, providing a more immersive experience by tracking users' steps in any direction.
insight: Enhanced immersion through body movement tracking in VR experiences

title: Meta is building a prediction market app, but it will launch without real-money bets
summary: Meta is developing a prediction market app called Arena without real-money betting.
insight: Regulatory compliance takes priority over real-money betting in early stages.

title: Meta just launched its own-branded smart glasses for $299
summary: Meta has launched Meta Glasses in partnership with EssilorLuxottica, priced at $299, undercutting previous entry-level models.
insight: Meta enters consumer electronics market with affordable smart glasses option.

title: Valve is working with Intel, AMD, and Nvidia to make SteamOS run on any PC hardware
summary: Valve is updating SteamOS to be more hardware-agnostic, working with major manufacturers.
insight: Wider compatibility boosts PC gaming's accessibility and ecosystem diversity.

title: Microsoft is selling new 8GB Surface laptops that don't qualify as Copilot+ PCs
summary: Microsoft has released new 8GB Surface laptops at $849-$949, powered by the Snapdragon X Plus SoC.
insight: Mid-range Surface laptops lack Copilot+ capabilities due to hardware limitations.

title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ sets a new performance bar with a very expensive handheld
summary: The MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ handheld pushes performance with Intel's Arc G3, but its high price of $1,800 and lack of OLED display make it a tough sell.
insight: Handheld gaming performance now rivals console-level graphics capabilities.

title: LG claims its OLED panels deliver perfect color and brightness accuracy
summary: LG Display's OLED panels pass new Intertek certification for color and brightness accuracy. This achievement allows LG to accurately convey its display technology's benefits. The certification is a testament to LG's commitment to quality.
insight: Accurate color and brightness representation enhances viewer experience quality.

title: Gas stations accused of using AI to inflate fuel prices in class-action lawsuit
summary: A class-action lawsuit accuses gas stations of using AI to inflate fuel prices, violating California's antitrust law.
insight: Gas stations' AI price manipulation may deceive consumers, harm competition.

title: Meta hits pause on AI training project after employee data became visible company-wide
summary: Meta pauses AI training project due to employee data visibility issue. The Model Capability Initiative tracks keystrokes, mouse movements for AI training. Employee data was made visible company-wide.
insight: Employee data privacy concerns undermine AI training initiatives.

title: Samsung shows off ultra-fast UFS 5.0 storage for flagship phones and on-device AI
summary: Samsung has announced its UFS 5.0 storage solution for smartphones and mobile devices. It delivers a maximum bandwidth of 10.8 GB/s, accelerating on-device AI workloads.
insight: Faster storage enables more efficient AI processing in mobile devices.

title: NHTSA opens new Tesla crash probe after Model 3 slams into home and kills resident
summary: A Tesla Model 3 crashed into a home, killing a resident. The driver claimed to be using an automated driving assistance system at the time. The NHTSA has opened a new investigation into the incident.
insight: Tesla's Autopilot system may be linked to fatal crashes again.

title: Cloudflare teams up with Chrome, Edge, and Firefox to tackle bot traffic without CAPTCHAs
summary: Cloudflare is developing a protocol with major browsers to combat bot traffic. The protocol aims to replace CAPTCHAs with a more user-friendly approach. It plans to submit the protocol for standardization.
insight: Enhancing online security without disrupting user experience significantly.

title: SK Hynix just surpassed Samsung to become South Korea's most valuable company
summary: SK Hynix surpassed Samsung to become South Korea's most valuable company, with a market cap of approximately $1.35 trillion.
insight: DRAM market dominance catapults SK Hynix to top South Korean spot

title: Oracle cuts 21,000 jobs, admits AI is reducing its workforce
summary: Oracle cut 21,000 jobs between May 31, 2025 and 2026, reducing workforce by 13%. This led to $1.8 billion in severance payments and restructuring costs.
insight: AI adoption drives significant workforce reductions in major tech companies.

title: Scientists created a paint so black it makes cars look like silhouettes
summary: Scientists at Nipsea Group developed an ultra-black coating absorbing 99.9% of visible light, making objects appear as silhouettes. The coating is inspired by Vantablack, a material known for its exceptional light-absorbing properties. This new coating could have various practical applications.
insight: Ultra-black coating enhances stealth and reduces visibility of objects
